mapper.sql: id, project_id, ocr_type, file_id, task_id, status, fields_json, custom_fields_json, error_message, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into ocr_record ( project_id, ocr_type, file_id, task_id, status, fields_json, custom_fields_json, error_message, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) values ( #{projectId}, #{ocrType}, #{fileId}, #{taskId}, #{status}, #{fieldsJson}, #{customFieldsJson}, #{errorMessage}, 1, 1, 0 )
mapper.select: select from ocr_record where id = #{recordId} and deleted = 0
mapper.update: update ocr_record set task_id = #{taskId}, updated_by = 1 where id = #{recordId} and deleted = 0
update ocr_record set status = #{status}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_by = 1 where id = #{recordId} and deleted = 0
update ocr_record set status = 'SUCCESS', fields_json = #{fieldsJson}, error_message = null, updated_by = 1 where id = #{recordId} and deleted = 0
update ocr_record set fields_json = #{fieldsJson}, updated_by = 1 where id = #{recordId} and deleted = 0
update ocr_record set deleted = 1, updated_by = 1 where id = #{recordId} and deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into generate_task ( project_id, task_type, biz_type, biz_id, status, current_stage, max_retry_count, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) values ( #{projectId}, #{taskType}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{status}, #{currentStage}, #{maxRetryCount}, 1, 1, 0 )
mapper.update: update generate_task set biz_id = #{bizId}, updated_by = 1 where id = #{taskId} and deleted = 0

update generate_task set status = #{status}, current_stage = #{currentStage}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, started_at = case when #{status} = 'RUNNING' then coalesce(started_at, current_timestamp) else started_at end, finished_at = case when #{status} in ('SUCCESS', 'FAILED', 'CANCELED') then current_timestamp else finished_at end, updated_by = 1 where id = #{taskId} and deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into task_stage_log ( project_id, task_id, stage_code, status, input_summary, output_summary, error_message, started_at, finished_at, cost_ms, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) values ( #{projectId}, #{taskId}, #{stageCode}, #{status}, #{inputSummary}, #{outputSummary}, #{errorMessage}, case when #{status} in ('RUNNING', 'SUCCESS', 'FAILED') then current_timestamp else null end, case when #{status} in ('SUCCESS', 'FAILED') then current_timestamp else null end, #{costMs}, 1, 1, 0 )
